title: rx_link_key not zeroed on early returns in lichen_l2_input
description:
Location: firmware/bridge-zephyr/subsys/lichen/lichen_l2.c:701-733

rx_link_key is declared and potentially copied (line 704) before lichen_link_rx(). If lichen_link_rx fails (line 719), secure_zero is called (line 722). However, if earlier returns happen (lines 653-662 before mutex, lines 674-677 before link_rx), the key copy doesnt exist yet.

The current code is CORRECT - secure_zero is called on line 722 after the only path where rx_link_key contains key material (when has_link_key is true and we reach line 704). Line 732 also zeros on success path.

This is a non-finding after analysis. CLOSE THIS ISSUE.
